name: Odysseus
description: Odysseus is a self-hosted AI workspace with chat, agents, deep research, documents, email triage, calendar, notes, and model management. Supports local and remote LLMs via Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp, OpenAI, and more.

notes.text: Admin password is generated during setup and printed in the terminal. Change it after first login in Settings.

Two usage scenarios: (1) Connect to a remote or separate LLM server — default 2 CPU / 4GB RAM / 8GB disk are sufficient. (2) Run a local LLM on the same container (e.g., Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp) — increase CPU/RAM/disk significantly depending on model size.
tmux is installed for Cookbook background model downloads and serves.
Configure LLM providers, search, and email inside Settings after first login.
Uses SQLite by default. For production, configure an external PostgreSQL database via .env.
